index.title: Notes
index.content:
This space is selectively published from multiple Obsidian vaults.
Only notes explicitly marked for publishing are included.

personal/welcome.title: Welcome to Notes
personal/welcome.content:
This app is designed to publish selected notes from different Obsidian vaults.
Use the frontmatter field publish: true to include a note in this site.
You can link to another note with Obsidian wiki links, for example: welcome.
